finding: `identity status --json` is a natural status command but returns generic usage text (`identity supports: set, show, clear`) instead of aliasing to `identity show` or printing the exact corrected command.
expectedBehavior: Status-style discovery commands should either work as aliases or emit copyable remediation such as `node atm.mjs identity show --json`.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed on 2026-07-13: `identity status` now aliases to `identity show`, emits `ATM_IDENTITY_SHOW`, and is covered by `tests/cli/identity-per-actor-routing.test.ts`; manual `node --strip-types packages/cli/src/atm.ts identity status --json` also returns ok.
followUp: Keep an eye on the remaining related discoverability idea: surface active claim actor mismatch earlier when legacy env identity differs from active session actor.
